## What & why
<!-- One meaningful unit of work. The *why* weighs more than the *what* (Law #5). -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `python -m pytest` is green
- [ ] `lifeline verify` returns `OK`
- [ ] Appended an entry to the line for this change (`lifeline log …`) — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Respects the 7 laws and the non-goals (`README.md` / `AGENTS.md`)
